eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Guadalupe, NM; at 02:39 PM ON MAR 30, 2026 Effective until 10:39 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Guadalupe: WILDFIRE WARNING, GO, Evacuation in St. Rd 91  MM 1 to 6 on east side.  Visibility in area will be reduced and roads/evacuation routes can become blocked; if you do not LEAVE NOW, you could be trapped, injured, or killed. Evacuation to Convention Center for shelter.
